name: CBN Networks
notes:
PT Cyberindo Aditama (CBN) is a leading Indonesian ICT company established in 1996, delivering reliable, high-performance connectivity across the nation. Over three decades, CBN has built a reputation for consistent innovation, reliability, and customer-centric services, contributing to Indonesia’s digital ecosystem and supporting the digital transformation of industries and individuals alike.

CBN Networks manages the following ASNs: AS38158, AS4787, and AS135478.
